summary: M1.3 structured control flow fully implemented and passing all acceptance criteria.

axc-lexer: token.rs: m1_reserved_detail() returns None for If, Else, For, While, Break, Continue — only Struct remains reserved
lexer.rs: updated test reserved_detail_after_m1_1_delists_let_mut to reflect M1.3 reality
axc-parser: ast.rs: added ElseArm enum, extended Stmt with If/For/While/Break/Continue
Removed 3 old tests expecting UnsupportedInM1_1 for if/for/while
Added 10+ new M1.3 parser tests (AT-301..AT-306, AT-327, AT-328)
axc-hir: loop_ctx.rs: NEW — HirLoopStack, ScopeStack with get_in_current_frame for correct duplicate detection
control_flow.rs: NEW — HirIf, HirElse, HirForRange, HirWhile, ForStep
typecheck.rs: 8 new TypecheckError variants, ScopeStack replaces flat HashMap, 27 new M1.3 tests
lib.rs: re-exports for all new types
axc-codegen: Cargo.toml: added axc-lexer as regular dependency (for Span in BodyCodegenError)
body.rs: emit_if/emit_for_range/emit_while functions, LoopCodegenCtx, current_block_terminated flag, 11 new tests
emit.rs: stmt_uses_gid extended for If/ForRange/While/Break/Continue, 6 new M1.3 integration tests

critical_design_decisions.CRITICAL-1_short_circuit_in_header: Rejected at typecheck with UnsupportedShortCircuitInHeader — OpSelectionMerge + OpLoopMerge cannot collide in same block
critical_design_decisions.AT-323_return_inside_loop: Deferred to M1.4 — codegen emits ReturnInsideLoopDeferred error
critical_design_decisions.scope_stack_anti_pattern: ScopeStack uses Vec not HashMap for deterministic order (anti-pattern #4)
critical_design_decisions.spirv_opvariable_prelude: ALL OpVariable declarations in first block per SPIR-V §2.16.1
critical_design_decisions.current_block_terminated: Dead code after break/continue/return silently dropped
critical_design_decisions.nested_scope_shadowing: get_in_current_frame checks only innermost frame for RedeclaredBinding — enables nested for loops with same induction var name
